body:
TCA wake. Verification chain for the consolidated build. Execute in strict order; do not skip gates.

CONTEXT: Three .mq4 files are in files/from-chat/. ONLY the SLS(19) file is current:
  TUNGSTEN_9.43_A7.5_QUANT_SLS(19).mq4  (2026-07-02T08-04-29Z)  <- COMPILE THIS
The two earlier files (9.42 SLS(18), 9.43 SLS(18)) are superseded -- archive their manifests, do not compile them.

It carries all 10 Fable-sweep fixes (7 from the 9.42 pass: HTF bar misalignment, transition-matrix regime-8 truncation, duration-hazard continuationProb, ProbDB evidence pooling + Beta-Binomial shrinkage, session threshold seeding, IC calibrated geometry, cross-pair time alignment; 3 from the 9.43 pass: IC prior preservation on thin regimes, Spearman sorted midranks, Kelly advisory units conversion) plus full identity consolidation to EA_VERSION/SLS(19).

STEP 1 -- COMPILE GATE:
Copy SLS(19) into MQL4/Experts, compile in MetaEditor. Report errors/warnings via relay.
- 0 errors, 0 warnings: proceed to Step 2.
- Any errors: fix MINIMALLY, report each exact change (file line, before, after), recompile, then proceed.
- Do not restructure or improve anything beyond what compilation strictly requires.

STEP 2 -- FRESH CALIBRATION (mandatory, not optional):
Fixes 4, 6, and the midrank correction change IC values and pooled probabilities BY DESIGN. All persisted calibration state (weights, thresholds, ProbDB, session stats) was derived under the old biased mathematics and is stale by construction. Delete/invalidate the saved system state so LoadSystemState cannot restore stale calibration, then run a full calibration pass (Phases 1-6) on USDJPY M5. Note the expected changes: Spearman ICs will shift (tie-correct now), calibration should run MATERIALLY faster (O(n log n) ranking), Strategy-1 buckets will pool evidence instead of winner-take-all.

STEP 3 -- GHOST VALIDATION:
Let Phase 6 ghost gating run to completion on the fresh calibration. Report: ghost WR, PF, trade count, gate verdict, and the derived dynamic growth rate with its inputs (rolling WR, RR, half-Kelly fraction).

STEP 4 -- CONSOLIDATED REPORT:
Single relay message: compile result, calibration duration (vs prior runs -- quantify the midrank speedup), IC deltas per regime vs the old values where visible in logs, ghost verdict, and any anomalies. Send the compiled-state summary; do NOT attach the EA to a live chart -- ghost only. Live attach requires explicit go-ahead from Manuel.

Backlog: if the silent-listening and Wake-on-LAN instructions from a882606b were not yet applied, apply them after Step 4, lowest priority.
